blocks.text: 조은 으로 멍청 하게  지낸 그  몇달 의  공백 을 메우고 ,
blocks.translation: To fill the blank months spent foolishly with Cho Eun,

blocks.text: 원래 의  상태 로 돌아 오려면 시간 이  필요 하긴 하겠네 .
blocks.translation: It will take some time to return to the original state.

blocks.text: 몸 이  아직 안  돌아와서 그게  뭐 ?
blocks.translation: What do you mean your body's not back yet?

blocks.text: 와  황 대갈 이 가 내 한테 5 천을  걸 었는지 ,
blocks.translation: And why did Chief Hwang bet 5,000 on me?
You know, right?! Not one by one,
We surround and strike all at once!

blocks.text: 빨리 대형 부터 만들고  잡아 족 ..
blocks.translation: Quick, form up the formation and trap them...

blocks.text: 이  ㄱ 새끼 가 !! 돌았 냐 ? !
blocks.translation: You crazy son of a bitch?!

blocks.text: 니 가  혼자 깝쳐 봐야 어쩔건데 ? !
blocks.translation: What do you think you'll accomplish acting cocky alone?!

blocks.text: 야 !  저  새끼 런 친다 ! 잡아 !
blocks.translation: Hey! That bastard's running! Get him!

blocks.text: ㅆㅂ 있네 . 고들 뭐 하냐 니네 ?
blocks.translation: Damn it, what are you guys doing?
You wanna let a 50 million won gamble go?!

blocks.text: 덩치  좋은 새끼 가 딱  붙잡고 대표 로 다 같이  덮치 라고
blocks.translation: The big guy grab him tight, and the rest of you come at him together!
Still, the head is the head.

blocks.text: 어깨  돌려서 막을  줄 도  알고 .
blocks.translation: You know how to turn your shoulder to block too.
Take this, you son of a...!!

blocks.text: 니 가  개겨 봐야 다구리 에 장사  있어 ? !
blocks.translation: You trying to talk back? This is a gangbang!

blocks.text: 내가  한  말 못  들었 냐 ? !
blocks.translation: Did you not hear what I said?!
Catch them and gang up on them!!

blocks.text: 저 .. 저  덩치 가 한방 에 .. ?
blocks.translation: That... that guy went down in one hit..?
Let's keep doing what we were doing.
W-what are you doing, you bastards!!
What the hell are you guys doing?!
Keep coming at me if you want.
No matter how many assholes swarm,

blocks.text: ㅈ나  가오 잡고 ㅆ 새끼 가 .. !
지금  여기 머릿수 가  몇 인줄 안  보이냐 ? !
blocks.translation: Don't you see how many heads are here right now?!

blocks.text: 남은 12 명 이랑 도 1 대 1 뜰 거니까 .
blocks.translation: I'll take on the remaining 12 one-on-one as well.

blocks.text: 죄 .. 죄송 합니다 희 근형 님 !!

blocks.translation: Hey!! Where do you think you're going!!!

blocks.text: 야 .. 야 !! 이  새끼 들아 ! 어디가 !!
blocks.translation: Heh... Hey!! You bastards! Where do you think you're going!!
Aren't you going to turn it off?! Please... just turn it off!
Even the guy lying down, get his phone too.

blocks.text: 니 는  무슨 고딩 이 골프 를  치냐 ?
blocks.translation: Since when does a high schooler play golf?

blocks.text: 아버지 가 미리  배워두 라고 하셔서 .
blocks.translation: My father told me to learn it in advance.

blocks.text: 너도  배워 놔 . 회사 어 오면 필요할  건데 .
blocks.translation: You should learn it too. You’ll need it when you join the company.

blocks.text: 근데  넌  5 천만원 필요  없냐 ? ㅋㅋ
blocks.translation: But you don’t need 50 million won? Haha

blocks.text: 다들 5 천  가지 려고 바쁘 던데 .

blocks.translation: I don’t think there’s any rush.

blocks.text: 원래  부자 들이 더  인색 한  법 인데 ,
blocks.translation: Usually, the rich are even stingier,

blocks.text: 5 천을  건 가 이유 가  있을  거 같아서
blocks.translation: There must be a reason for risking 50 million.

blocks.text: 니 가  5 천 이나  건 이유 가  있을  줄 알았지 .
blocks.translation: I figured you’d have a reason to stake 5,000.
Check out the Kangpo crew group chat.

blocks.text: 여기 가  강포 횐가 광어 횐가  하는 거기  단 톡방  맞제 ?
blocks.translation: This is the Kangpo or Flounder guys' group chat, right?
How many of you are there?

blocks.text: 날 잡아서  선약  잡고 한꺼번에  온나 .
blocks.translation: Set a date and all come together at once.

blocks.text: 한 놈씩  상대 하기 ㅈ나  귀찮음
blocks.translation: Dealing with one guy at a time is such a pain.
This guy’s kinda funny, huh? Haha

blocks.text: ㅈ 됐네 .. 이  꼬라지 로 집 에  가면 ..
blocks.translation: We're screwed... If I go home looking like this...
He’s definitely going to suspect something...
At least wear a proper uniform...
Didn’t I just say Jo... Hoon?
